description_long: This apartment building complex consists of several mid-rise structures arranged in a city block layout, surrounded by intersecting asphalt roads and sidewalks. The buildings feature flat roofs, with some topped in muted gold and others in gray, and facades dominated by large, regularly spaced windows. The exteriors are primarily clad in light-colored materials, with some buildings displaying a grid-like pattern of windows and others with more modern, glass-heavy facades. Small clusters of green trees are interspersed between the buildings, adding a touch of nature to the urban environment. The streets are marked with yellow dashed lines, and the overall arrangement suggests a planned, modern residential neighborhood. The buildings appear to be constructed from concrete, glass, and steel, typical of contemporary apartment complexes.
description: A modern apartment building complex with multiple mid-rise structures, flat roofs, and large, regularly spaced windows, surrounded by city streets and greenery.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the front and side facades of the largest buildings, highlighting their flat roofs, grid-like window patterns, and the adjacent roads.
description_view_1: View 1 provides a perspective down the main street, emphasizing the alignment of the buildings and the central intersection, with trees visible between structures.
description_view_2: View 2 focuses on the rear and side facades, showing more of the green space and the staggered arrangement of the buildings.
description_view_3: View 3 presents the opposite side, with a clear view of the tree-lined area and the back entrances of the apartment buildings.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are arranged in a highly regular, grid-like pattern with even spacing both vertically and horizontally, creating a symmetrical and orderly appearance across all facades.
